sourceAmbiguity: The authenticated account page could have presented all contact rows as one editable profile.
decisionTaken: Separated NHS login claims, Vecells preferences, and external demographic rows into distinct source families.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Identity authority, preference authority, and demographic authority have different edit and freshness rules.
operationalRisk: Future account-profile work may try to collapse the sections for brevity.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Any unified profile must keep the source-family and side-effect boundaries visible.
